title: ToolTreaux 10pc Double Ended Fine Cut Riffler File Set for Metal Jewelry Work
description:
The 10pc Wood Rasp Riffler File Set is a great addition to any hobbyist's tool collection. Each set comes with 10 wood rasp riffler files that are double ended and constructed of bearing steel, making it ideal for fine cuts! The assorted riffler files come in flat, curved, pointed, paddles, thin, wide, round and other assorted shapes that make it a great tool for projects that require use in hard to reach areas to finish precision work. Good for woodworking, machinists, hobby, crafting, jewelry, home repair, furniture and more. The tough double ended steel rasp files give you twice the options for your project. The length of each file is 175mm, and they come in a plastic case for storage while not in use

ToolTreaux 10pc Double Ended Fine Cut Riffler File Set for Metal Jewelry Work

Achieve precision and detail with the ToolTreaux 10pc Double Ended Fine Cut Riffler File Set, designed specifically for detailed metal shaping and finishing. This versatile set includes 10 files made from durable bearing hardened steel, providing the strength and durability needed for working with metals and other hard materials.

Ideal for jewelers, metalworkers, machinists, sculptors, model makers, and hobbyists, these riffler files are perfect for shaping, smoothing, and refining metal surfaces, contours, and tight spaces where standard files cannot reach. The fine Italian-style cut allows for controlled material removal and detailed finishing on metals such as gold, silver, brass, copper, aluminum, and other non-ferrous metals.

Key Features

  • PRECISION METALWORKING FILE SET - Designed specifically for shaping, smoothing, and refining metal surfaces. Ideal for jewelry making, metalworking, machining, model making, and detailed finishing on small metal components.
  • DURABLE HARDENED STEEL CONSTRUCTION - Made from bearing hardened steel for strength and long-lasting performance. The fine cut teeth allow controlled material removal and detailed finishing on metals.
  • 10 DOUBLE-ENDED FILES (20 WORKING ENDS) - Each riffler features two uniquely shaped filing ends to access tight spaces, curves, contours, and intricate areas that standard files cannot reach.
  • VERSATILE SHAPE SELECTION - Includes curved, tapered, angled, round, half round, equaling, knife, and square profiles for a wide variety of metal shaping, deburring, and finishing tasks.
  • ORGANIZED STORAGE POUCH INCLUDED - Files measure 7 inches long with a 3mm diameter and come neatly organized in a durable PVC pouch for convenient storage and easy transport.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: CCRF175-2-341
  • UPC: 060886132820
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: 10pc

Each file features a double-ended design with precision-cut teeth, allowing access to difficult angles and intricate areas when working on metal components, jewelry, castings, or detailed mechanical parts. The hardened steel construction ensures long-lasting performance and consistent results during detailed metalworking tasks.

Note: These riffler files are designed for use with metal and hard materials. They are not intended for wood or soft carving applications.

The set includes the following shapes: -Curved -Tapered -Angled -Round -Half Round -Equaling -Knife -Square

SPECIFICATIONS

-Length: 7 inches -Diameter: 3mm -Material: Bearing hardened steel -Cut: Fine (Italian style) -Design: Double-ended -Storage: Comes organized in a durable PVC pouch
